name: Coruscant

moons.name: Habitation Spheres
moons.description: Two large spherical space stations housing thousands of people. Yet to be completed.

locations.name: Senate Building
locations.description: Former seat of the galactic senate.

locations.name: Imperial Palace
locations.description: A labyrinthine maze inside a pyramidal structure that used to be the primary residence of the Emperor.

notes: A city-world under immense surveillance, with whole districts sealed behind shifting security cordons.
